headlines.headline: Arnik Commerce begins scheduled maintenance of wireless connectivity systems

sentiment.reasoning: Beginning scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity that is generally neutral, as it is planned and necessary, but could imply minor, temporary service disruptions.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
